Video.summary: A couple want to evict their violent 31-year-old son, while their son blames his parents for his financial struggles.
Video.title: Our Son is a Violent Mooch

Image.alt: Our Son is a Violent Mooch
Our Son is a Violent Mooch
Our Son is a Violent Mooch
Our Son is a Violent Mooch
Our Son is a Violent Mooch
Our Son is a Violent Mooch
Our Son is a Violent Mooch

Video.summary: A mother says her teen daughter is aggressive, violent and a bully who crossed a line when she threatened to shoot her teacher and other students.
Video.title: 14 Yo Handcuffed & Out of Control

Video.summary: Craig and Cherie say the last half of their 16-year marriage has been anything but happily-ever-after. Cherie says Craig is chauvinistic, verbally abusive and demands sex, which she admits she only gives him about three to four times a year. Craig says Cherie withholds sex to control him, and as a result, he has become a slave to his anger. Cherie fears the tension in their household is taking a toll on their 11-year-old daughter, who is often caught in the crossfire of their fighting. Dr. Phil challenges the couple to a communication test. Can they heal their wounds and rekindle their romance? Then, meet the couple who inspired the movie, The Vow. Shortly after Kim and Krickitt Carpenter were married, a terrible car crash changed everything. Krickitt lay in a coma for weeks, and awoke with no recognition of her husband. The couple shares their inspiring, though oftentimes heartbreaking, journey of falling in love all over again. How did they find their way back to each other? And what is it like seeing their lives played out on the big screen? If you’ve ever wondered whether love can survive the toughest of challenges, you won’t want to miss this show! This show contains strong sexual content. Viewer discretion advised.
Video.title: Complicated Love

Video.summary: Parents say their daughter's home is unsafe for grandson.
Video.title: Grandson in a Filthy Death Trap!

Image.alt: Grandson in a Filthy Death Trap!
Grandson in a Filthy Death Trap!
Grandson in a Filthy Death Trap!
Grandson in a Filthy Death Trap!
Grandson in a Filthy Death Trap!
Grandson in a Filthy Death Trap!
Grandson in a Filthy Death Trap!

Video.summary: Shara claims that her newlywed husband, Luke, is a “mean, insecure know-it-all” who won’t let her own a cell phone, hold a job or leave the house alone -- and also dictates how she should dress and wear her makeup. Luke denies all of Shara’s allegations and claims that she is “no angel” and has a vicious temper. Can this marriage be saved?
Video.title: Trapped By My Controlling Husband

Video.summary: Phyllis and Barry say they're desperate to calm their violent 15-year-old son, Brandon, and turn to Dr. Phil for help. Their requests for Brandon to perform simple tasks such as brushing his teeth or bathing cause him to go into a rage, breaking things and punching holes in walls, and even chasing Phyllis with scissors. Barry says they walk on eggshells, waiting for Brandon’s next violent outburst and that every day he leaves the house worried that his wife may not be alive when he returns. What is at the root of Brandon's anger? Dr. Phil spends some one-on-one time with the young man to determine what’s driving his behavior. And, find out what Phyllis recently found in Brandon’s room that shocked her to her core.
Video.title: Teenage Rage

Video.summary: Meleah and Greg's young love story started and ended like so many. But when Meleah discovered she was pregnant following their breakup, their lives became forever intertwined. Watch as sparks fly when they face off! Plus, Paige was a teen mom struggling to make ends meet. You won't want to miss her remarkable update!
Video.title: Baby After Breakup

Video.summary: A racist man tries to change his ways. A man finds out he is biracial.
Video.title: Racism Follow Up

Video.summary: These parents say their precious daughters have turned into bullies. Dr. Phil spells out how "commando parenting" will reshape the behavior of their "little mean girls."
Video.title: Little Mean Girls

Video.summary: The family of a 16-year-old self-professed gang member comes together to urge the teen to turn his life around. And, two former gang members have an important message for the teen -- Is he ready to walk away from the gang life for good?
Video.title: Young, Privileged, And In A Gang

Image.alt: Young, Privileged, And In A Gang
Young, Privileged, And In A Gang
Young, Privileged, And In A Gang
Young, Privileged, And In A Gang
Young, Privileged, And In A Gang
Young, Privileged, And In A Gang
Young, Privileged, And In A Gang

Video.summary: The conversation continues with a woman who says her sister lied about health diagnoses for attention.
Video.title: Saving Shemida: What’s The Truth?

Video.summary: In part one, viewers met 21-year-old Bailey who says she has the greatest love story of the century. She says she met Jasmine on social media eight months ago and that it was love at first post. She says they’ve been communicating day and night but have never spoken on the phone and have never met. When Dr. Phil first tried to talk to Bailey, she became insistent that her mother, Ericka, not participate in the show, and Bailey angrily walked off the stage. Bailey decided to come back to tell Dr. Phil she wants to meet Jasmine for the first time because she has something important to tell her. Will Dr. Phil allow Bailey to meet the target of her obsession?
Video.title: "My First Face-To-Face Meeting"

Video.summary: Rylee, 26, admits she’s a sugar baby and says she has no shame in dating wealthy, married men she meets online in exchange for money and lavish gifts -- and three years ago, she even convinced her mother, Tanya, to join her. Dr. Phil sits down with this mother/daughter sugar baby team, who insist they never have sex with their clients. What “services” do they say these men are paying for? And how does their family feel about their lifestyle? Then, Ashley admits she has had a side job as a sugar baby for years but has yet to tell her fiancé, Cesar -- and she wants Dr. Phil to help her confess. How will Cesar respond? And, reality TV star Kendra Wilkinson opens up about her husband, Hank Baskett’s, alleged affair with a transsexual. Does she believe the rumors? And, can her marriage survive the turmoil?
Video.title: The Secret World of Sugar Babies

Image.alt: The Secret World of Sugar Babies
The Secret World of Sugar Babies
The Secret World of Sugar Babies
The Secret World of Sugar Babies
The Secret World of Sugar Babies
The Secret World of Sugar Babies
The Secret World of Sugar Babies

Video.summary: In part two, will accused liar Sarah, who fibbed about having cancer, miscarriage and muscular dystrophy, change her ways?
Video.title: Liar,Liar: Sarah Faces Her Accusers

Video.summary: Pamela says in just nine days, she is likely going to jail for not complying with court orders because she refuses to allow her ex, Justin, his court-ordered visitations with their children. Pamela says she believes Justin is a dangerous narcissist who she claims has locked the kids out of the house and attempted to drown their oldest daughter in the pool. Pamela says she will do whatever it takes to protect her kids from Justin, even if that means going to jail. Justin claims Pamela is a hateful, controlling, bitter ex, who has brainwashed their children into making up stories, and says Pamela’s claims of abuse are lies! These parents have been back and forth to court and claim nothing has been resolved. So, who is telling the truth? Is Justin an abusive father, or is Pamela a jealous ex making up stories for revenge? Can Dr. Phil get these parents on the same page for the sake of their children? Find out!
Video.title: Custody Battle

Video.summary: Imagine your pregnant teen daughter running away to be with the baby's father -- an older man whom she met online. For Heidi, this became reality when her 15-year-old daughter, Brittney, went missing for five weeks. Dr. Phil put private investigator and former FBI Agent Harold Copus on the case to find the missing teen. See the confrontation when Harold finally locates her and her 34-year-old boyfriend. Then, find out why Brittney was even more upset when she found out what was in store for her. It's been two months; has Brittney's relationship with her mother improved? Next, Kim, 15, has run away six times in the last year, most recently making it halfway across the country to be with her married boyfriend. Why didn't her parents look for her, and why does she say she'll do anything to get away from them? Can this family learn to get things back on track? Think your child is being targeted by a sexual predator? Don’t miss Dr. Phil’s warning signs!
Video.title: Runaway Dramas

Video.summary: Dr. Phil blows the whistle on what many parents are doing wrong. Find out if you're guilty of making the same mistakes.
Video.title: Child Discipline Done Right

Video.summary: They’re self-absorbed, spoiled and entitled brats, otherwise known as Generation Me. MTV correspondent Kim Stolz recently hit the streets of New York to find out how the younger generation feels about this label. Don't miss the candid responses. Then, Bradley, 24, says he wants to be rich and drive a Lamborghini, but he only wants to put in 80 percent of the effort. He still relies on his mom, Christine, to pay his rent and other bills. Will Bradley learn to stand on his own two feet? Plus, Monica says her 18-year-old daughter, Courtney, is an “entitlement princess,” and she gives the teen money just to keep the peace. Will mom and daughter get a wake-up call? And Jean Twenge, author of Generation Me, reveals why many young people are narcissistic.
Video.title: Generation Me

Video.summary: This is one powerful episode you can’t miss! Join us as Dr. Phil gives out-of-control mothers the tools they need to curb their offensive behavior. Learn how one single mother’s yelling and offensive language are driving away her teenage kids. Plus, one woman gave up a career to be a stay-at-home mom. Now regret and anxiety have taken over to create a potentially dangerous situation for her children. Whether dealing with teenagers or toddlers, every parent knows that unrelated stress can lead to unwanted outbursts. Learn through these courageous moms how you can be a better parent.
Video.title: Can't Stand Being a Mom

Video.summary: In this powerful program, Dr. Phil exposes the frightening yet underreported problem of mothers on the verge on committing child abuse. We meet ordinary women who live in fear that they’re going to hurt their children in a fit of uncontrollable rage. Chrystel says she feels rage and snaps and then it gets to the point where there's no return. Jessica says her fits of rage become so intense, she's scared that she will hurt her son. Answering their desperate pleas for help, Dr. Phil explains how to identify cues leading up to this precarious state, and tells moms what to do when they start to lose control.
Video.title: Moms on the Verge Part 1

Video.summary: In this powerful program, Dr. Phil once again exposes the frightening yet underreported problem of mothers on the verge of committing child abuse. We meet ordinary women who live with the fear that they’re going to hurt their children in a fit of uncontrollable rage. Joanna says her rage is scaring her son. Michelle’s rage has driven her to slap her child and hit her with a wooden spoon. Lisa admits to pulling her daughter’s hair when she gets angry. Answering their desperate pleas for help, Dr. Phil explains how to identify cues leading up to this precarious state, and tells moms what to do when they start to lose control.
Video.title: Moms on the Verge Part 2

Video.summary: Being a single mother is hard enough, but imagine juggling soccer practice, PTA meetings and homework ... all while trying to cover up a secret life. Susan is a single mom with two kids who works as a prostitute to pay the bills. She says she's never had a real job and is addicted to the money she makes as an escort. Can Susan ditch her dangerous job and turn her life around? Then, Stephanie is a single mother of four and has been hiding a secret for 12 years. She's addicted to painkillers and takes up to 60 times the recommended dosage just to make it through the day. Fearing for their lives and those of their children, the women turn to Dr. Phil.
Video.title: Secret Lives of Single Moms

Video.summary: In September 2013, Kelli Stapleton and her 14-year-old daughter, Issy -- who suffers from severe autism -- were found in the family van, suffering from carbon monoxide poisoning. Could Kelli have done the unthinkable? In a Dr. Phil exclusive, the jailed Michigan mom opens up about what happened.
Video.title: Mom Tried To Kill Autistic Child (Pt. 1)

Image.alt: Mom Tried To Kill Autistic Child (Pt. 1)
Mom Tried To Kill Autistic Child (Pt. 1)
Mom Tried To Kill Autistic Child (Pt. 1)
Mom Tried To Kill Autistic Child (Pt. 1)
Mom Tried To Kill Autistic Child (Pt. 1)
Mom Tried To Kill Autistic Child (Pt. 1)
Mom Tried To Kill Autistic Child (Pt. 1)

Video.summary: Dr. Phil continues his exclusive jailhouse interview with Kelli Stapleton, a mother accused of trying to kill herself and her severely autistic 14-year-old daughter, Issy. Were there any warning signs that she was reaching her breaking point? And, find out how you can help Issy secure a healthy and productive future.
Video.title: Driven To Try And Kill Her Child? (Pt. 2)

Image.alt: Driven To Try And Kill Her Child? (Pt. 2)
Driven To Try And Kill Her Child? (Pt. 2)
Driven To Try And Kill Her Child? (Pt. 2)
Driven To Try And Kill Her Child? (Pt. 2)
Driven To Try And Kill Her Child? (Pt. 2)
Driven To Try And Kill Her Child? (Pt. 2)
Driven To Try And Kill Her Child? (Pt. 2)

Video.summary: Courtney claims that after her parents’ divorce six years ago, her mother, Michelle, became a “party girl” who basically traded in her children for a life of parties, drinking and men. Courtney says her mother’s dangerous behavior has already resulted in 2 DUIs and a serious car accident that nearly killed her. Courtney says her greatest fear is that “the next time I see my mom will be at her funeral.” Michelle claims that after her divorce, Courtney and her two other children went on with their lives without her, and says that’s why she turned to friends, men and drinking. What does Dr. Phil say Michelle must do to save her life and save her relationship with her children?
Video.title: My Mom Is A Party Girl

Image.alt: My Mom Is A Party Girl
My Mom Is A Party Girl
My Mom Is A Party Girl
My Mom Is A Party Girl
My Mom Is A Party Girl
My Mom Is A Party Girl
My Mom Is A Party Girl

Video.summary: Fifty-six-year-old widow Sebrina says she’s in love with her overseas boyfriend of one year, “James,” whom she has talked to online and over the phone but has never met in person. Sebrina admits she has sent “James” more than $250,000 -- emptying her life savings -- but believes he will pay her back, as promised, when he pays off business debt, returns to the United States and marries her. Sebrina’s daughter, Sarah, says she’s at her wits’ end trying to convince her mother that she’s being scammed -- even presenting evidence to prove it -- but Sebrina continues to send “James” money. Dr. Phil enlists the help of private investigator Doug Kane to look into “James’” claims and find the truth. Has Sebrina fallen victim to a catfish? Plus, don’t miss what happens when Dr. Phil confronts “James” over the phone!
Video.title: Hooked By A Catfish

Video.summary: Millions were inspired by the first “Role of the Man” show. Now, Dr. Phil is making it an ongoing series and checking in with past guests. Remember the husband who provided everything for his wife…except intimacy? He’s back! Are they now sleeping in the same bed? Then, you’ll hear from the man who wanted his wife to have sex with him on demand. Did he change his selfish ways or is he still in the doghouse? Plus, what’s a mama’s boy to do when his wife insists he cut the umbilical cord once and for all?
Video.title: Man’s Role (Update)

Video.summary: Beka is a mom of three teenage girls who she says are angry, violent and out of control. She says an argument with her oldest daughter Arielle escalated to a life-threatening altercation when the 16-year-old stabbed her with a kitchen knife. Arielle was arrested and sent to juvenile detention for the incident, but is she remorseful? And are her 15-year-old identical twin sisters following in her footsteps? Beka says they are "evil" and have threatened to kill her too. But the twins tell a different story, claiming Beka is the one who is manipulative and abusive. They say she drinks excessively, has choked them and has even tried to take her own life. Can Dr. Phil get to the root of the real problem in this tumultuous household? Beka's husband, Jody, weighs in. Plus, Dr. Phil delivers a shocking message to this family in crisis -- Don't miss it.
Video.title: Stabbed In The Heart… By My Teen

Image.alt: Stabbed In The Heart… By My Teen
Stabbed In The Heart… By My Teen
Stabbed In The Heart… By My Teen
Stabbed In The Heart… By My Teen
Stabbed In The Heart… By My Teen
Stabbed In The Heart… By My Teen
Stabbed In The Heart… By My Teen

Video.summary: "Let me take a moment to read a few lines of a heartbreaking letter of a 10-year-old boy caught in the middle of an ugly, ugly custody battle between his parents" Dr. Phil says. He reads, “I'm bawling my eyes out with the tears of sadness. Dad, I never thought I would say this, but I always think that you're with another girl or sleeping with another girl. Question for dad: Mom says she still loves you and misses you. Do you still love her? Put a check in one of the boxes: yes or no.”
Video.title: The Fight Over Your Child

Video.summary: A mother describes her daughter's self-destructive behaviors.
Video.title: 16 and on the Path of Destruction

Image.alt: 16 and on the Path of Destruction
16 and on the Path of Destruction
16 and on the Path of Destruction
16 and on the Path of Destruction
16 and on the Path of Destruction
16 and on the Path of Destruction
16 and on the Path of Destruction

Video.summary: With the economy in trouble, a lot of people are under pressure and getting desperate. Learn the tools to protect yourself from liars, cheats and scammers who are trying to take advantage.
Video.title: How To Spot A Scammer
